Examples.Title: Get Render Status
Examples.Description: Get the rendering status, temporary asset url and details of a render by ID. **Base URL:** https://api.shotstack.io/edit/{version}
Examples.Code:
### Get Render Status
# @name getRender
GET {{host}}/edit/v1/render/{{id}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The render status details
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Render Asset
Examples.Description: Queue and render the contents of an [Edit](#tocs_edit) as a video, image or audio file. **Rendering Process:** 1. **Validation**: The edit JSON is validated 2. **Download**: All assets are downloaded and cached 3. **Preprocessing**: Video assets are automatically processed to fix compatibility issues 4. **Rendering**: The timeline is rendered using the processed assets 5. **Output**: The final media file is generated and stored **Video Preprocessing:** Video assets undergo automatic preprocessing to ensure compatibility. You can force preprocessing by setting `"transcode": true` on video assets. See [Preprocessing](#preprocessing) for more details. **Base URL:** https://api.shotstack.io/edit/{version}

Examples.Title: Update Template
Examples.Description: Update an existing template by template id. **Base URL:** https://api.shotstack.io/edit/{version}
Examples.Code:
### Update Template
# @name putTemplate
PUT {{host}}/edit/v1/templates/{{id}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "My template",
  "template": {
    "timeline": {
      "soundtrack": {},
      "background": "string",
      "fonts": [],
      "tracks": [],
      "cache": true
    },
    "output": {
      "format": "mp4",
      "resolution": "hd",
      "aspectRatio": "16:9",
      "size": {},
      "fps": 25,
      "scaleTo": "preview",
      "quality": "medium",
      "repeat": true,
      "mute": false,
      "range": {},
      "poster": {},
      "thumbnail": {},
      "destinations": []
    },
    "merge": [
      {}
    ],
    "callback": "https://my-server.com/callback.php",
    "disk": "local",
    "instance": "s1"
  }
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Update a templates name and [Edit](#tocs_edit)
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Fetch Source
Examples.Description: Queue a source file to be fetched from a URL and stored by Shotstack. Source files can be videos, images, audio files and fonts. Once ingested, new [output renditions](#tocs_outputs) can be created from the source file. **Base URL:** https://api.shotstack.io/ingest/{version}
Examples.Code:
### Fetch Source
# @name postSource
POST {{host}}/ingest/v1/sources
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "url": "https://github.com/shotstack/test-media/raw/main/captioning/scott-ko.mp4"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Description: The queued source file details
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: A list of validation and other errors
# Content-Type: application/json
